home.title: Hi, I'm Luciano Gomez
home.subtitle: A passionate software developer with experience in creating modern and responsive web applications. I specialize in front-end development with a strong focus on user experience and clean design.

projectOne.title: Project One
projectOne.description: A brief description of Project One, highlighting the technologies used and the problem solved.

projectTwo.title: Project Two
projectTwo.description: A brief description of Project Two, focused on user experience and responsive design.

projectThree.title: Project Three
projectThree.description: A brief description of Project Three, detailing the architecture and key functionalities.

projects.title: My Projects
projects.subtitle: Here's a selection of some of my recent work. Explore each project to see how I turn ideas into functional and attractive digital realities.

ecommerce.title: E-commerce Platform
ecommerce.description: Development of a responsive and high-performance online store using React, Node.js and a headless architecture.

fitness.title: Fitness App
fitness.description: UX/UI design and development of a native mobile application for tracking workouts and physical progress.

corporate.title: Corporate Web Redesign
corporate.description: A modern and fully responsive website to improve the online presence and user experience of a technology company.

experience.title: Professional Experience
experience.subtitle: My professional journey, from my beginnings to my current role.

job1.title: Full Stack Engineer
job1.description: Part of the development team at Blumb AI, an AI company focused on improving user experience in web applications, serving as a strategic partner that helps and supports businesses in their migration to AI.

job2.title: Full Stack Developer
job2.description: Contributed to the development of a robust carpooling system, which was to be implemented in the province of Córdoba, Argentina. Reducing environmental impact by decreasing the use of private vehicles and promoting sustainable mobility.

job3.title: Full Stack Developer Junior
job3.description: Responsible for responsive website layout, creating graphic assets and collaborating in an agile team to deliver an MVP of an intelligent agents platform.

journey.title: My Journey
journey.description: I am a passionate and results-oriented professional with a special ability to create innovative solutions. My journey in the world of technology has been driven by relentless curiosity and a desire to make a tangible impact.

interests.title: My Interests
interests.description: When I'm not immersed in code or design, you can find me exploring nature, experimenting with new recipes in the kitchen, or lost in a good book.

philosophy.title: My Philosophy
philosophy.description: I believe in the power of collaboration, continuous learning, and a human-centered approach in everything I do. My philosophy is simple: stay curious, humble, and always strive to build things that matter.

meta.title: Luciano Gomez Portfolio
meta.description: Passionate software developer with experience in creating modern and responsive web applications.
